headline: Aftercare & Maintenance
lead: Caring for your N Veneers is simple. With the right habits, your investment can last up to two decades.

tips.title: Brush Twice Daily
tips.description: Use a soft-bristled toothbrush and a non-abrasive toothpaste to protect the porcelain surface.

tips.title: Wear a Night Guard
tips.description: If you grind your teeth at night, a custom guard protects your N Veneers from excessive force.

tips.title: Regular Check-Ups
tips.description: Visit your dentist every six months for professional cleaning and to monitor the condition of your veneers.

tips.title: Avoid Hard Foods
tips.description: Do not bite directly into hard items like ice, hard candy, or bones with your veneered teeth.
